name: concat_empty_identity
reason: concatenating empty sequence should be identity — tests basic Seq concat axiom that the lemma relies on

name: concat_len_additive
reason: concat length should be sum of lengths — foundational axiom the proof depends on

name: equal_seqs_same_suffix_equal
reason: tests the cancellation direction — if concat equality doesn't imply prefix equality, the biconditional is broken

name: different_len_seqs_different_concat
reason: sequences of different lengths should produce different concatenations — tests contrapositive of the cancellation law

name: prefix_not_equal_to_full
code:
proof fn phi_5_prefix_not_equal_to_full(s: Seq<int>, suffix: Seq<int>)
    requires
        suffix.len() > 0,
    ensures
        s != s + suffix,
{
}
reason: a sequence should not equal itself with a nonempty suffix appended — tests that concat strictly increases length
